overall.description: A third-person exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, showing a character walking along a sunny waterfront boardwalk with futuristic skyscrapers in the background. The character passes an NPC, ascends and descends a staircase to a street level, then continues through an overgrown palm tree area toward an abandoned amusement park structure before entering a dark underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront boardwalk with futuristic city skyline

events.description: NPC observer moves away from the railing and walks left
camera passes the NPC, briefly showing their back

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the boardwalk overlooking the water and distant skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: leaning on railing enjoying the view, then walking away toward the left

futuristic building with curved concrete and glass facade
tall skyscrapers with neon accents in the distance
tall palm trees lining the boardwalk
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront boardwalk with a futuristic city skyline in the background. An NPC stands at the railing on the right before moving away. The camera walks forward along the wooden planks, passing curved modern architecture on the left and palm trees ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase connecting boardwalk to upper street level

events.description: reaches top of stairs, revealing street level with parked cars and neon signage
begins descending the stairs back to boardwalk level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs to street level, pausing briefly to observe, then descending

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal handrails on both sides
silver metal handrails along the staircase
upper level street with concrete pavement
cyan neon sign reading WILD BLEED above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and ascends a concrete staircase with metal handrails. At the top, a brief view reveals a street level with parked cars and a cyan neon sign reading WILD BLEED. The camera then immediately descends the stairs back to the lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned waterfront area with overgrown vegetation and amusement park ruins

events.description: exits staircase area into overgrown palm grove with dry grass
approaching abandoned roller coaster structure visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the overgrown palm tree area toward abandoned structures

entered.detail: cluster of tall palm trees with dry fronds
overgrown yellow-brown grass covering the ground
large metal roller coaster structure with visible tracks
modern building with sharp geometric angles and dark windows

segments.scene_description: After descending the stairs, the scene opens into an overgrown waterfront area with dry grass and palm trees. The camera walks along a wooden path toward an abandoned amusement park, with a large roller coaster structure visible on the left and modern angular architecture on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway between buildings with debris and trash

events.description: enters the shadowed underpass between two concrete buildings

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark covered passage between structures

entered.detail: shadowed passage between two large concrete buildings
large industrial dumpster with yellow lid and hazard stripes
tall concrete walls forming the sides of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a dark, covered underpass between concrete buildings. The lighting shifts dramatically as the scene becomes shadowed. A yellow dumpster and trash bags are visible on the right as the camera moves deeper into the covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, futuristic waterfront boardwalk into a shadowed urban underpass. It begins by gliding along wooden planks past a city skyline and a departing NPC, moving alongside curved modern architecture and palm trees. As the camera reaches a concrete staircase, it ascends briefly to reveal a street level with parked cars and a cyan neon sign before immediately descending back to the lower level. The scene then opens into an overgrown waterfront area of dry grass and palms, where the camera tracks toward a large, abandoned roller coaster structure. Finally, the lighting shifts dramatically as the camera enters a dark, covered underpass between concrete buildings, passing a yellow dumpster and trash bags as it moves deeper into the shadows.
